title: The world’s leading deepfake expert no longer trusts his own eyes
description: New York Times: "Within a year or two, our whole visual system will be utterly useless."
author: Eli Saslow

title: Revenue Minister Simon Watts clashes with Greens’ Chlöe Swarbrick on whether big tech firms pay enough tax in NZ
description: An expert says NZ could bring in hundreds of millions more if IRD did more digging.
author: Jenée Tibshraeny

title: Riding the AI boom: Coromandel’s Thomas Mosen lands US$25m backing for his New York-based start-up, Sea12
description: Sea12 now has 14 staff in New York and aims for eight-figure revenue this year.
author: Chris Keall

title: Kiwi founder Jeff Hawke secures $529m for Odyssey AI with backers including Amazon, Icehouse Ventures
description: Odyssey has secured US$310m in Series B funding at a US$1.45b valuation.
author: Chris Keall
